name: Struggle F.O
short_description: What the newly awakened girl saw was an unfamiliar world and unfamiliar creatures. And on her arm, there was a mysterious gadget that could speak. Somehow, the girl who could now communicate with all living creatures, starts to struggle with her allies to survive in this world!
detailed_description:
A mysterious world where science fiction and fantasy merge


In the world of Struggle for, there are humans, elves, dwarves, dinosaurs, dragons, wyverns, and various fantastical elements.
Although at first glance the world appears to be a fantasy world,
traces of science can be found here and there. And robots made with advanced technology...

In such a dangerous and mysterious world, we will explore for the sake of survival and human development.



Easy-to-play action RPG


There are no difficult controls at all.
You can enjoy exhilarating battles with easy and simple controls!
Choose the armament and effects suggested by the gadgets to suit the situation, overcome increasingly intense offensives, and bring back more resources!



So cool! Cute! Attractive characters


Dozens of unique enemy characters vary in appearance conditions, such as region, weather, and day-night differences.
Gather compatible allies and weaponry, combine them strategically, and strive to gain the upper hand in battles!



You can make almost all enemies your allies!


Moreover, there are rare allies that are not easily encountered within the game.
Your allies can vary based on factors such as location, time of day, and weather.
Some of them are rare and hard to find.
By gathering and combining allies with various characteristics, you'll be able to experience a diverse range of battles.



A fulfilling and enjoyable growth system.


The characters who become your allies have different personalities and strengths.
As you train them, you can also enhance them to your own liking.

Furthermore, by selecting partners and utilizing methods such as breeding and fusion, you can give birth to offspring inheriting talents, allowing you to raise even stronger individuals.

A village that serve as a base of daily life


There are very few places in this world where humans can live in peace.
The first village you visited was one of those few places where we could live in peace.
In return for being accepted, the girl will accept a job in this village.
The residents also help her in many ways.
They make weapons and tools, strengthen them, and help with breeding.
With the support of the residents, you can explore the area and gather materials and information,
and develop your community as you go.



The regions will be revealed one after another.


By using the materials obtained in each region to develop weapons, armor, and to train your allies, your fighting strength improve and
you will be able to challenge new regions.
Depending on the region, different enemies and materials will appear.
The environment is also different in each region, so you will need to be prepared for the weather and temperature, such as protection against cold and heat.



Super-powerful bosses! Fierce dungeons!


Each region has its own unique dungeons and bosses.
Using materials collected in the region to craft weapons and armor by residents of village,
and if you have strengthened your equipment and the creatures that have become your allies, you are ready to take on the challenge!

supported_languages: Japanese, English, Simplified Chinese, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Korean
